---
title: "Recent Publications"
description: ""
output: distill::distill_article
---

Find all our publication as PDFs also at [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/).   
  
For older publications please check here:<br> [2025](pubs-2025.html)&ensp;|&ensp;[2024](pubs-2024.html)&ensp;|&ensp;[2023](pubs-2023.html)&ensp;|&ensp;[2022](pubs-2022.html)&ensp;|&ensp;[2021](pubs-2021.html)&ensp;|&ensp;[2020](pubs-2020.html)&ensp;|&ensp;[2019](pubs-2019.html)&ensp;|&ensp;[2018](pubs-2018.html) 

<br>

## 2026

<div class='headerbox'><hbox>Peer-Reviewed Publications</hbox></div><br>

* Bruckermann T, Bock D, Greving H, Schumann A, Stillfried M, **Börner K**, … Harms U. (2026): Attitudes and motivation influence how participants engage in different scientific activities in the online community of a citizen science project. BEHAV INF TECHNOL, 1–18. doi:<span>[10.1080/0144929X.2026.2641601](https://doi.org/10.1080/0144929X.2026.2641601)</span>   

* **Figueiredo L**, **Scherer C**, **Kramer-Schadt S**, Cabral JS, Kéfi S, Van den Brink PJ, **Radchuk V** (2026): estar: An R package to measure ecological stability. METHODS ECOL EVOL. **00**, 1–11. doi:<span>[10.1111/2041-210x.70265](https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210x.70265)</span>  

* Gomez CR, Sartor CC, Macdonald DW, Johnson PJ, Goossens B, Panjang E, Gardner PC, Abram NK, **Guharajan R**, **Wong ST**, Jubili J, Kuntagil J, Acheh SNA, Kissing J, William WO, Brodie J, Helmy O, Bernard H, Matsuda I, Hearn AJ (2026): Habitat suitability model for identifying human‐wildlife interface and implications for wildlife trade of Sunda pangolin in Borneo. ENVIRON MONIT ASSESS **198**, 108. doi:<span>[10.1007/s10661-025-14922-6](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10661-025-14922-6)</span>

* **Kasper K**, Tee TL, **Guharajan R**,  **Mohamed A**, **Wong ST**, **Niedballa J**, Abrams JF, Kissing J, Samejima H, **Sollmann R**, **Wilting A**,  Wong W-M (2026): Estimating Sunda Clouded Leopard Lifespans From Minimum Residence Times via Long-Term Photo-Tracking. BIOTROPICA **58**, no. 2: e70169. doi:<span>[10.1111/btp.70169](https://doi.org/10.1111/btp.70169)</span> 

* **Kürschner T**, **Radchuk V**, **Planillo A**, **Scherer C**, Blaum N, Staubach C, Thulke HH, **Kramer-Schadt S** (2026): Reconciling Dynamic Epidemiological Models with Long-Term Outbreak Data: The Case of Classical Swine Fever in Germany. ECOSPHERE **17(2)** e70539. doi:<span>[10.1002/ecs2.70539](https://doi.org/10.1002/ecs2.70539)</span>  

* Liang Y, **Kramer-Schadt S**, et al. (2026): Extra-territorial excursions of Eurasian lynx (*Lynx lynx*) during the mating season across Europe. PROC R SOC B **293**:20252235. doi:<span>[10.1098/rspb.2025.2235](https://doi.org/10.1098/rspb.2025.2235)</span> 

* Nguyen AT, **Nguyen A**, Nguyen TV, ... , **Niedballa J**, **Wilting A**, **Tilker A** (2026): New record of dhole *Cuon alpinus* in Vietnam, yet apparent decline of the species across the country. ORYX. **2026**:1-4. doi:<span>[10.1017/S0030605325101580](https://doi.org/10.1017/S0030605325101580)</span> 

* **Radchuk V**, Jones CV, McLean N, ..., **Kramer-Schadt S**, ...  et al. (2026): Changes in phenology mediate vertebrate population responses to temperature globally. NAT COMMUN **17**, 479. doi:<span>[10.1038/s41467-025-68172-8](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-68172-8)</span> 

* **White EW**, Höner OP, Mosna M, **Radchuk V**, **Benhaiem S**, Davidian E (2026): The Effect of Social Rank on Reproductive Traits Depends on Rank Metric: Evidence From a Group-Living Carnivore.” ECOL EVOL **16**, no. 3: e73229. doi:<span>[10.1002/ece3.73229](https://doi.org/10.1002/ece3.73229)</span>

<div class='headerbox'><hbox>Reports and other scientific outlets</hbox></div><br>
